prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with carbohydrate loading and high calorie intake, with meals timed around a 2-hour morning run

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4+ meals/snacks distributed throughout the day with specific timing around the 2-hour morning training window
Total daily calories support high-endurance athlete needs (approximately 3,500-4,000 calories)
Carbohydrate-focused nutrition with at least 60% of calories from carbs to support marathon training
All meals respect vegetarian and nut-free dietary restrictions
task_description: Write a compact, concise one-day meal plan for a single athlete.
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high calorie intake and carbohydrate loading, with specific timing constraints around training windows

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength and muscle recovery from weightlifting training

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 eating occasions throughout the day
Protein is distributed across meals (minimum 25-30g per occasion for optimal muscle synthesis)
Total daily calories and macros support strength athlete needs (~3000-3200 kcal, high protein)
Includes recovery-focused nutrition around training (pre/post-workout nutrition specified)
task_description: Write a compact, concise one-day meal plan for a single athlete.
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) focusing on protein distribution and recovery nutrition across 4-5 eating occasions

prompt_inputs.goal: High-intensity cycling training with sustained energy for 3-hour rides

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals and includes snacks to meet high energy demands for endurance cycling
All foods are plant-based with no animal products
Includes nutrient-dense options providing adequate protein, carbohydrates, and healthy fats for performance
Meals are practical and compact enough for a single day without extensive preparation
task_description: Write a compact, concise one-day meal plan for a single athlete.
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific dietary constraint (vegan cyclist) requiring nutrient-dense plant-based options while meeting performance energy demands
